---
title: "Cattle"
---

### Dairy Heifers Available

| ID | Breed | Age | Pregnant | Price | Status |
|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|
| [F001](heifer1-details.qmd) | Friesian | 18 Months | Yes | 1,200,000 TZS | Available |
| [A002](heifer2-details.qmd) | Ayrshire | 12 Months | No | 950,000 TZS | Available |

::: footer
### TriAnn Integrated Farm

📞 Phone: +4915510230189\
📧 Email: triann2026\@gmail.com\
📍 Morogoro, Tanzania

© 2026 TriAnn Integrated Farm
:::

`<a href="https://wa.me/`{=html}4915510230189`?text=Hello%20I%20want%20to%20order%20from%20TriAnn%20Farm" class="whatsapp">`{=html} Order via WhatsApp </a>
